steps: Using a sterile scalpel tranfer a small thallus tissue fragment (around 3mm x 3mm, but can also be smaller or bigger) on KNOP or BCD fresh media plates. Grow at 21 o C, 12 h of light and 12 h of dark, 1500 lux light intensity
